_comment: Canonical Heartbeat wire payload published by g8eo to the heartbeat:{operator_id}:{operator_session_id} pub/sub channel. This is the full message shape — it IS the envelope (g8eo does not wrap heartbeats in a G8eMessage). Heartbeat is THE source of truth for operator host identity. Consumers: g8ee (Python G8eoHeartbeatPayload in pubsub_messages.py → OperatorHeartbeat.from_wire), g8ed (JS HeartbeatSnapshot.fromHeartbeat).
_comment.field_naming: FIELD NAMING: Wire format models use 'operator_id' instead of 'id' for clarity in cross-component contexts where the entity type may not be immediately obvious. This maps directly to OperatorDocument.core_identity.id (see operator_document.json _comment.field_naming for the full convention).

heartbeat._description: Full heartbeat message published by g8eo. Contains both the routing envelope fields and the telemetry payload inline.

envelope_fields._comment: Top-level fields that serve as the message envelope.

case_id.description: Associated case identifier at time of heartbeat

investigation_id.description: Associated investigation identifier at time of heartbeat

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when heartbeat was created

heartbeat_type.description: Why this heartbeat was sent. See status.json heartbeat.type.

system_identity._description: Static host identity. Same fields every heartbeat; consumers merge into stored SystemInfo.

pwd.description: Current working directory of the operator process

network_info._description: Current network state of the operator host.

operator_version.description: Semver version string of the g8eo binary

performance_metrics._description: Real-time resource utilization at time of heartbeat.

capability_flags._description: Operator capability flags indicating available features on this host.

local_storage_enabled.description: True when local vault (Project Chronos) storage is active

git_available.description: True when git is available on the operator host

ledger_enabled.description: True when LFAA ledger mirroring is active

_comment.field_mapping: g8ee validates payload as G8eoHeartbeatPayload (pubsub_messages.py) then calls HeartbeatSnapshot.from_wire to produce the persisted/SSE shape defined in #operator_heartbeat below.

operator_heartbeat._description: Canonical normalized heartbeat shape. Produced by HeartbeatSnapshot.from_wire(G8eoHeartbeatPayload) in g8ee, persisted on the Operator document (latest_heartbeat_snapshot + heartbeat_history), and serialized verbatim as `metrics` inside HeartbeatSSEEnvelope (see heartbeat_sse.json). Consumers: g8ee (Python HeartbeatSnapshot), g8ed frontend HeartbeatSnapshot. No flat projection exists — the frontend model mirrors this shape 1:1.

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when g8ee received the source heartbeat.

system_fingerprint.description: SHA256 fingerprint of stable host attributes.

is_cloud_operator.description: True when the operator is cloud-hosted.

cloud_provider.description: Cloud provider identifier (null when not cloud-hosted).
